title: SlyLog / HVAC Cycle Timeline & Duty Stats

target.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, kind || ': ' || coalesce(detail->>'node', '') AS text, kind AS tags FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND kind IN ('boot','ota')
SELECT ts AS time, kind || ': ' || coalesce(detail->>'reason', detail->>'header', '') AS text, kind AS tags FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND kind IN ('capture_gap','capture_session')

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, action AS "action" FROM hvac_state WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1

WITH e AS (SELECT ts, kind, lead(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS nts, lead(kind) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS nkind FROM events WHERE kind IN ('cycle_start','cycle_stop') AND detail->>'cmd' = 'COOL_DEMAND' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours') SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_start') AS "cycles", round((100 * coalesce(sum(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND nkind = 'cycle_stop'), 0) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "on-time %", round((avg(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND nkind = 'cycle_stop') / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "avg run min", round((avg(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_stop' AND nkind = 'cycle_start') / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "avg off min" FROM e

WITH e AS (SELECT ts, kind, lead(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS nts, lead(kind) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS nkind FROM events WHERE kind IN ('cycle_start','cycle_stop') AND detail->>'cmd' = 'HEAT_DEMAND' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours') SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_start') AS "cycles", round((100 * coalesce(sum(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND nkind = 'cycle_stop'), 0) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS "on-time %", round((avg(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND nkind = 'cycle_stop') / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "avg run min", round((avg(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) FILTER (WHERE kind = 'cycle_stop' AND nkind = 'cycle_start') / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "avg off min" FROM e
SELECT time_bucket('1 day', ts) AS time, detail->>'cmd' AS metric, count(*)::int AS starts FROM events WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

WITH e AS (SELECT ts, kind, detail->>'cmd' AS cmd, (detail->>'pct')::float AS pct, lead(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY detail->>'cmd' ORDER BY ts) AS nts, lead(kind) OVER (PARTITION BY detail->>'cmd' ORDER BY ts) AS nkind FROM events WHERE kind IN ('cycle_start','cycle_stop') AND $__timeFilter(ts)) SELECT ts AS "start", cmd AS "demand", pct AS "pct", round((extract(epoch FROM nts - ts) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "run min" FROM e WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND nkind = 'cycle_stop' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50
